twinAppearance.helpModalSubtitle: How to configure your Digital Twin
twinAppearance.helpAvatarIntro: Choose how your digital twin will look when talking to your clients:
twinAppearance.helpPredefinedDesc: Select one of our professional avatars from the catalog. Recommended for getting started quickly.
twinAppearance.helpTrainedDesc: Upload a video of yourself of at least 2 minutes to create a custom avatar that looks like you.
twinAppearance.helpVoiceIntro: Define how your digital twin will sound:
twinAppearance.helpStandardDesc: Choose a professional voice from our catalog. There are male and female options in multiple languages.
twinAppearance.helpClonedDesc: Feature coming soon to create a voice identical to yours.
twinAppearance.helpTip1: • Predefined avatars work perfectly with standard voices.
twinAppearance.helpTip2: • You can change the configuration at any time.
twinAppearance.helpTip3: • Try the play button to listen to the selected voice.

twinBehavior.headerSubtitle: Define the personality and rules of your Twin.
twinBehavior.objectiveDescription: Define the main purpose of your digital twin. What do you want it to achieve for you?
twinBehavior.objectivePlaceholder: e.g. Handle client inquiries, schedule appointments, answer frequently asked questions about my services...

twinKnowledge.headerSubtitle: Provide information so your Twin becomes an expert.
twinKnowledge.aboutYouDescription: Tell your digital twin who you are and how you work.
twinKnowledge.aboutYouPlaceholder: e.g. I'm a lawyer specializing in labor law with 15 years of experience...
twinKnowledge.faqDescription: Add frequently asked questions you receive so your twin can answer them.
twinKnowledge.documentsDescription: Upload relevant documents to enrich your twin's knowledge.
twinKnowledge.urlDescription: Add links to relevant web pages with information about your services.
twinKnowledge.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
twinKnowledge.hintFaq:
Write FAQ and their answers. e.g.

What are your hours? 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, Monday to Friday.
twinKnowledge.hintServices:
List your services or products with descriptions. e.g.

- Initial consultation: 60 min full evaluation.
- Follow-up: 30 min session.
twinKnowledge.hintPricing:
Enter your rates and prices. e.g.

- Consultation: $50
- Full session: $80
- 5-session pack: $350
twinKnowledge.hintPolicy:
Describe your company policies. e.g.

Cancellations: 24h notice required.
Payment methods: Cash, card, transfer.
twinKnowledge.hintTroubleshooting:
Add solutions to common problems. e.g.

If you have trouble booking, contact us via WhatsApp.
If you don't receive confirmation, check your spam folder.

helpProProfile.title: Help - Professional Profile
helpProProfile.subtitle: Everything you need to know to complete your profile.

sections.photoDescription: A professional photo increases client trust. We recommend a clear image with good lighting.
sections.nameDescription: Use your real name or business name. Clients will see this name when searching for you.
sections.categoryDescription: Choose the category that best represents your area of expertise. This helps clients find you.
sections.descriptionDescription: Write a brief description of your services, experience, and specialties. Be clear and concise.

sections.nameDescription: Enter your full name. This will be the name professionals see.
sections.emailDescription: Use a valid email address. You'll need it to log in and receive notifications.
sections.passwordDescription: Create a secure password of at least 6 characters. Combine letters, numbers, and symbols.
sections.termsDescription: Read and accept the terms of service and privacy policy to continue.

helpTwinAppearance.title: Help - Appearance
helpTwinAppearance.subtitle: Configure the visual appearance of your Digital Twin.

sections.avatarDescription: Choose an avatar from the catalog or train a custom one with your own video. The avatar visually represents your digital twin.
sections.voiceDescription: Select a standard voice from the catalog or clone your own voice. The voice is how your twin will communicate with users.
sections.previewDescription: Use the preview button to see and hear how your digital twin will look before saving.

helpTwinBehavior.title: Help - Behavior
helpTwinBehavior.subtitle: Define how your Digital Twin behaves.

sections.objectiveDescription: Define what you want your digital twin to achieve. Be specific for better results.
sections.interactionDescription: Adjust the formality, depth, and tone of responses to match your professional style.
sections.guardrailsDescription: Set what your twin can and cannot do to maintain service security and quality.

sections.aboutDescription: Present who you are, your experience, and specialties. Your twin will use this information to introduce itself.
sections.faqDescription: Add the questions you receive most with their answers. Your twin will use them to respond automatically.
sections.documentsDescription: Upload relevant documents like brochures, guides, or service information to enrich knowledge.
sections.urlsDescription: Add links to your website, social media, or any relevant page with information about your services.

proProfile.headerSubtitle: Complete your profile to connect better.
proProfile.aliasHelpText: Your alias will be your unique and permanent identity on TwinPro. It will be used in your URL: twinpro.app/@{{alias}}
proProfile.aliasTaken: This alias is already in use
proProfile.aliasRequired: Please enter an alias for your profile
proProfile.aliasInvalid: The alias is not valid or is already in use

helpProProfileFaq.a1: Your alias is your unique identifier on TwinPro (e.g., @DrSmith). It will appear in your public URL and cannot be changed, so choose one that represents your professional brand well.
helpProProfileFaq.a2: It's the name your clients will see. It can include professional titles like 'Dr.', 'Esq.', etc. You can change it anytime.
helpProProfileFaq.q3: How do I choose the right category?
helpProProfileFaq.a3: Select the category that best represents your main area of work. This will help clients find you more easily in the directory.
helpProProfileFaq.a4: Specialties allow you to detail your areas of expertise. For example, if you're a lawyer, you can add 'Labor Law', 'Divorces', etc.
helpProProfileFaq.q5: What should I put in the introduction?
helpProProfileFaq.a5: Briefly describe your experience, professional approach, and what sets you apart. It's your opportunity to connect with potential clients before they contact you.
helpProProfileFaq.a6: Yes, all fields except the alias are editable from your professional dashboard at any time.
helpProProfileFaq.guide1Title: How to create an attractive profile
helpProProfileFaq.guide3Title: Tips to stand out on TwinPro

helpTwinAppearanceFaq.quickTipText: Choose an avatar and voice that represent your professional brand. Clients trust well-configured profiles more.
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.a1: A digital twin is a virtual representation of you that can interact with your clients using your chosen voice and appearance, answering frequently asked questions and scheduling appointments.
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.q2: What's the difference between predefined and trained avatar?
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.a2: Predefined avatars are ready-to-use models from the catalog. Trained ones are created from your own video for maximum authenticity (requires Premium plan).
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.q3: How do I choose the right voice?
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.a3: Listen to the available voice samples and choose the one that best represents your brand. Standard voice offers varied professional options; private voice is your own cloned voice (Premium).
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.q4: Will my clients know they're talking to AI?
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.a4: Yes, a clear notice will always be shown that they are interacting with an AI assistant based on your professional profile.
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.q5: Can I change the appearance later?
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.a5: Yes, you can change the avatar and voice at any time from your digital twin settings.
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.q6: What do I need to train an avatar with my face?
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.a6: You need to record a short video following the instructions (good lighting, neutral background, speaking to camera). The training process takes a few hours.
helpTwinAppearanceFaq.guide1Title: How to choose the best avatar

helpTwinBehaviorFaq.quickTipText: Customize your twin's behavior so it responds just like you would.
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.a1: It's the main purpose you want your twin to fulfill. For example: 'Handle inquiries, schedule appointments, and answer FAQs'. The clearer it is, the better it will respond to your clients.
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.q2: What does the formality level mean?
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.a2: 'Very casual' uses a friendly tone, 'Professional' maintains a balance, and 'Very formal' uses formal language. Choose based on your personal brand.
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.a3: 'Short' gives brief and direct answers. 'Balanced' adds useful context. 'Detailed' offers complete explanations. It depends on the complexity of your service.
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.q4: How does the emotional tone work?
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.a4: 'Empathetic' shows understanding and warmth. 'Neutral' is objective and factual. 'Direct' gets to the point. Empathetic works well in health and coaching, direct in legal and consulting.
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.a5: They are safety rules that control what your twin can and cannot do. For example, it can 'Give prices' but not 'Give medical advice'. This protects you and your clients.
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.q6: Can I add my own rules?
helpTwinBehaviorFaq.a6: Yes, you can add allowed actions and custom restrictions. Simply type in the corresponding field and press Enter. You can remove them by tapping the X.

helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.quickTipText: Start with FAQs and pricing. These are the most common client questions.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.q1: What is the knowledge base for?
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a1: It's the information your Digital Twin will use to answer inquiries. The more relevant information you upload, the better answers it will give your clients.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.q2: What types of documents can I upload?
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a2: You can upload PDF, Word (DOC/DOCX), or plain text (TXT) files up to 10MB. You can also add URLs from your website or write content manually.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a3: They are predefined thematic areas: FAQs, Services, Pricing, Policies, and Troubleshooting. Organizing info this way helps the twin give more accurate responses.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a4: Yes, each category has an 'Add Manual' button to write directly. This is useful for FAQs, price lists, or policies you don't have in a document.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.q5: What's the difference between URL and uploading a file?
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a5: With URL, the twin can access public web pages. With files, you upload private documents. Both methods are valid and complementary.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.q6: Can I activate the twin without uploading documents?
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a6: Yes, but your twin will have limited information. We recommend at least completing FAQs and services to provide useful answers to your clients.
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.q7: Can I update the information later?
helpTwinKnowledgeFaq.a7: Yes, you can add, edit, or delete documents from your professional dashboard at any time. Changes are applied automatically.

helpRegisterUserFaq.a1: TwinPro is a platform that connects users with professionals through AI-powered digital twins. You can chat with a professional's digital twin 24/7 and receive instant answers.
helpRegisterUserFaq.q2: What can I do as a user?
helpRegisterUserFaq.a2: As a user, you can search for professionals, chat with their digital twins, book appointments, write reviews, and save your favorite professionals.
helpRegisterUserFaq.q3: What information do I need to create my account?
helpRegisterUserFaq.a3: You only need your name, a valid email, and a password of at least 6 characters. The password confirmation must match.
helpRegisterUserFaq.a4: It's optional. If you accept it, you help us improve the platform through anonymous usage data. It doesn't affect your experience if you decline.
helpRegisterUserFaq.q5: Can I use my Google account?
helpRegisterUserFaq.a5: Yes, you can sign up or log in with Google for faster access without needing to create a password.
helpRegisterUserFaq.a6: Yes. We use encryption to protect your information. You can check our Privacy Policy for more details.
helpRegisterUserFaq.guide2Title: How to chat with a digital twin
